response.overview: At an old photo shop on Bergsgatan in Malmö, a treasure trove of memories awaits. Amongst a myriad of cameras, film rolls and lenses, we meet Lennart - the grumpy yet irresistibly charismatic owner. His shop seems frozen in time, but when a wave of younger customers disrupts his well-worn routines, Lennart's knowledge of analogue photography becomes a rare and invaluable gift. Through funny misunderstandings, the film captures a warm meeting of generations as Lennart guides his new customers.
response.title: Fotoaffären
